_meta.scope: deployed-20, web-validatable (validated+doable), one export per factor
_meta.status_legend: pending → done(✅ parity) / diverged(✗ real gap) / blocked / skipped
procedure_per_factor: 1. 果仁 web: rank-ONLY on this single indicator, universe to match (or a broad universe — factor VALUES are 范围/universe-invariant), 选股日期 ≤ local calendar max.
2. 导出 → rename 果仁_{date}_{universe}_{indicator}.xlsx under Knowledge/果仁验证因子/.
3. derive/confirm the local_expr (validated rows already have it; doable rows: map the 果仁_formula → local qlib expr via guorn_local_field_mapping.md conventions).
5. record status/verdict here (re-run this script preserves it).

factors.guorn_formula: (refq(CoreProfitQ,0)-refq(CoreProfitQ,4))/abs(refq(CoreProfitQ,4))
factors.verdict: ✅ penny/display-exact (median 0.0061%, Spearman 0.994, Pearson 0.998); selection top-5/10/20 = 100%/100%/100% (no ⚠); derived expr from validated CoreProfitQ components reproduces 果仁 exactly

factors.note: doable→derived; 95% cov (--min-coverage 0.90, young-stock no-q4 attrition)

Best build (TTM归母/end-eq QoQ diff). 净资产收益率 LEVEL reproducible but the diff is negative-equity-fragile (果仁 #1=000692 eq −1.29亿→333). NOT verification-complete (top-K fails the gate); book-level immaterial (1/16 weight).

factors.verdict: ◑ top-K NOT ASSESSABLE at 2025-12-31 — only 10/4412 stocks have an active 业绩预告 at year-end (2025-annual forecasts are issued Jan 2026, mandatory by Jan-31), so the factor is inherently sparse pre-season → cov 0.2%, can't compute a meaningful top-K. VALUE was validated at rung-3 (38,252 holdings across dates, median 4.4e-05). To assess top-K, re-export at a forecast-dense date (late Jan/Feb 2026). $forecast__np_q_yoy is a sparse forecast-issuer sub-universe factor (gate on non-null).

factors.verdict: ✅ VERIFIED (2026-07-01, T1 batch): penny-exact + top-K 100/100/100. 果仁 真实负债资产率 = 负债合计/(资产总计−商誉−无形资产−开发支出) (剔除虚资产后的真实杠杆; 果仁 可转债系统指标 def, 财务指标--清偿能力). Local $total_liab_q0/($total_assets_q0 - $goodwill_q0 - $intan_assets_q0 - $r_and_d_q0) with NaN->0 coalesce on the 3 subtracted intangibles (banks / no-goodwill / non-capitalizing-R&D firms report NaN not 0). cov 99.9% (4408/4412), med rel-err 0.0052%, within-1% 99.9%, sign 100%, Spearman/Pearson 1.000, top-5/10/20 = 100%. lag 0. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-真实负债资产率.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-真实负债资产率.xlsx
factors.note: T1 batch; 真实=负债/(资产−商誉−无形−开发支出)

factors.guorn_indicator: 股价振幅%当日成交额10日
factors.local_expr: Mean(((high-low)/pre_close)/$amount,10) lag1 (computes fine locally; 果仁 side degenerate)
factors.guorn_formula: MA(股价振幅/当日成交额,10)
factors.verdict: 🔴 UNVERIFIABLE — 果仁-side INTERNAL precision collapse, MEASURED (2026-07-01 T2): exported with it as the sole ranking factor — value column all 0.0 (1 distinct) AND 总排名分 has only 220 distinct levels with 3341/4412 names TIED at 排名分=100.0 => 果仁's INTERNAL values quantize to 0.00 for 76% of the universe (not just display). Rank comparison vs local MA(((high-low)/pre_close)/$amount,10): Spearman -0.74 (right sign, tie-destroyed), top-K meaningless (果仁's top = arbitrary pick among 3341 ties). REPLICATION IMPLICATION for the 4 deployed books using it: the factor has ~NO selective power on 3/4 of the universe — 果仁 tie-breaks by undocumented internal order; treat its weight as ~inert + noise in book reproduction. Upgrades the ledger note ('display 0.00') to a measured internal fact. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-振幅比成交额10日.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-振幅比成交额10日.xlsx
factors.note: T2; measured 果仁 internal quantization: 76% tie at 排名分100, 220 rank levels; unverifiable both levels

factors.verdict: 🔴 AUDIT DOWNGRADE done→blocked (2026-07-01): recorded Spearman 0.122 / top-K 0/0/0 is NOISE, not rank-faithful — the prior 'done' violated the top-K gate. Same root cause as 近期评级变化: 果仁/朝阳永续 standardized rating-UPGRADE events are not visible in the Tushare report_rc rating stream (band-mapped ratings show ~zero changes in any window). Vendor event-stream gap — no local fix. dep=4 books: treat as inert/noise in replication. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-评级调高家数.xlsx

factors.guorn_formula: (refQ(所得税费用(单季),0)-refQ(所得税费用(单季),4))/abs(refQ(所得税费用(单季),0))
factors.verdict: ✅ VERIFIED after AUDIT caliber fix (2026-07-01): the prior 'done' verdict (med 61%, top-K 0%) was computed with the WRONG denominator (q4). 果仁's formula literally divides by the CURRENT quarter: (refQ(所得税,0)-refQ(所得税,4))/abs(refQ(所得税,0)). With abs(q0): med rel-err 0.00%, within-5% 98.0%, Spearman 0.996, top-5/10/20 = 5/5, 9/10, 19/20 — penny + top-K pass. local: ($income_tax_sq_q0-$income_tax_sq_q4)/abs($income_tax_sq_q0), lag 0. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-所得税费用QGrPY.xlsx
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-所得税费用QGrPY.xlsx

factors.guorn_formula: AvgQ(总股本,4,0)/AvgQ(总股本,4,4)-1
factors.verdict: ◑ RANK-FAITHFUL, structure PINNED via ATOM EXPORT; value vendor-capped (2026-07-01 v2 decomposition). Pinned 果仁's AvgQ(总股本,4,k) by exporting a TEMP custom indicator AvgQ(总股本,4,0) (deleted after): window = 4 CALENDAR quarters INCLUDING the current unreported one — local mean{$total_share, $total_share_q0,_q1,_q2} matches the atom 0.0000% EXACTLY on the event names (比亚迪 6.078132e9, 成飞 2.674437e9, 步步高, 国联民生); AvgQ(,4,4) = {q3..q6}. Solved per-name: 比亚迪 quarters {9.117,9.117,3.039,3.039}e9, 成飞 {2.6721,2.6721,2.6768,2.6768}e9. RESIDUAL = share-event TIMING in 果仁's vendor share history vs BOTH local sources: provider bins are REPORT-anchored (94.7% atom-exact) and raw daily_basic is effective-date but lags some events (成飞 Sep cancellation appears Oct; BYD odd Q2 5.495e9 intermediate) — no single local source reproduces all names; ~7% of the atom differs >1% whichever source. As a FACTOR: best local build = balance-sheet (Σq0..3)/(Σq4..7)-1, official top-K 100/90/85 PASSES (rank-usable); value-exactness on 增发/回购/M&A names is vendor-capped. BONUS data-infra finding: provider $total_share bin lags raw daily total_share (report vs effective anchoring; BYD 3.039e9 at 10-31 vs raw 9.117e9) while $total_mv matches raw EXACTLY -> flagged for re-materialization. Exports: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-SharesAvgGrPY.xlsx + _AvgQ总股本40.xlsx (atom)
factors.export_file: 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-SharesAvgGrPY.xlsx
factors.note: v2 decomp: window semantics pinned via temp-indicator atom export; residual = vendor share-event timing; provider $total_share lag flagged

factors.verdict: ✅ penny-exact + TOP-K STRONG: top-5/10/20 = 80/80/90, Spearman 1.000, Pearson 1.000, median 0.025%, cov 97.9%. 后复权 ratio (close*adj)/Ref(,250)-1, lag 0. ⚠ 2 of 果仁 top-20 unvalued locally (recent-listing no-250d-history). Window-membership residual immaterial to top-K. Broad 排除ST排除科创, single condition.

✅ REPRODUCED via caliber (my earlier 'irreducible' verdict was WRONG). 果仁 股息率TTM = Σ declared cash div (税前 cash_div_tax, most-finalized amount, ANN-date 预案 TTM window, PIT ann≤signal) / raw close. Validated 2025-12-31: median 0.52% rel (isolated on 果仁 price), top-5/10 100%, Spearman 0.992; on local close top-5 100%/top-20 90%. $dv_ttm (ex-date REALIZED) matches the BULK (0.70% med) but diverges at the high-yield TAIL/selection: counts announced-not-yet-ex (600329 2.450) + drops old-announcement-ex'd (603167 0.220). Helper: guorn_dividend_caliber.py.

factors.verdict: ✅ OVERALL verified (◑ structure-exact): medRelErr 1.13%, within-5% 90.9%, Spearman/Pearson 0.998, sign 99.9%, top-K 80/100/95, cov 98.4%. CALIBER DISCOVERED: 历史贝塔 = beta vs 沪深300 (000300_SH), N=250, SIMPLE 后复权 returns (NOT 上证指数; index×window probe: 000300@250 medRelErr 1.10% vs all other combos 10-40%). beta_000300_sh_250_20251231.parquet; export col 历史贝塔 in 果仁_..._排名-贝塔N日+历史贝塔.xlsx

factors.local_expr: sumq(分红,4,0)/sumq(分红,4,4)-1 report-period + stale-预案 drop (declared_dividend_by_quarter)
factors.guorn_formula: sumq(分红总金额,4,0)/sumq(分红总金额,4,4)-1
factors.verdict: ✅ VERIFIED at display precision (2026-07-01 v4, stale-预案 rule): top-5/10/20 = 80%/100%/90% (official comparator, all >= the 80% gate), Spearman 0.985, Pearson 0.991, median rel-err 0.060%. Caliber = sumq(分红总金额,4,0)/sumq(,4,4)-1 REPORT-PERIOD per-share, counting DECLARED events but dropping stale unimplemented 预案 (>240d old, the 正丹-class phantom; declared_dividend_by_quarter drop_stale_plans). The value-tier '✗' is the 4-dec export QUANTIZATION diluting within-x% on small growth values (果仁 0.0253 vs 0.025316 = 0.46%; ATR%-class display artifact) — top names match to 4+ digits. The single top-5 boundary miss is order-noise at the quantization floor. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-DivGrPY.xlsx

factors.local_expr: trading-days to next-report pre_date (roll-forward on non-trading; PIT-else-earliest row; disclosure_date)
factors.verdict: ◑ CALIBER FULLY DECODED, vendor-timing residual (2026-07-01, the 'unlockable' T4): 财报预约公布天数 = TRADING days from signal to the NEXT report's scheduled disclosure date (data/fundamentals/disclosure_date pre_date for end_date 20251231), with THREE pinned elements: (1) trading-day count NOT calendar (cal-days gave constant ~+41 on the April cluster, PIT-subset Spearman 1.000); (2) a pre_date landing on a NON-trading day (19% do - weekend schedules!) rolls FORWARD to the next trading day (EXACT 70.2%->86.3%); (3) 果仁 displays the schedule AS-OF the signal (PIT snapshot). Official comparator: cov 99.9%, EXACT 86.3%, Spearman 0.889, top-5/10 80%/80% (pass), top-20 70%. Residual ~12% = schedule-REVISION timing (果仁's as-of-signal table vs Tushare disclosure_date row set - 威领股份 30 vs 77 = later postponement) + my 2026 Mar-Jun calendar EXTENSION (frozen trade_cal ends 2026-02-27; weekdays minus 清明/五一 approx). Was mis-triaged as a Tier-4 data gap - disclosure_date was ingested all along. 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-财报预约公布天数.xlsx

factors.guorn_formula: 营业收入-营业成本(单季)-(管理费用(单季)+销售费用(单季)+财务费用(单季))-营业税金及附加(单季)

factors.guorn_formula: (ref(每股收益,0)-ref(每股收益,4))/abs(ref(每股收益,4))-1
factors.verdict: ✗ NOT reproduced — ROOT CAUSE = 果仁-side formula bug (2026-07-01, help-doc-confirmed + empirically verified; supersedes the earlier vague "unstable-denominator" note). 果仁 自定义函数列表 §二: ref(x,N) steps by TRADING DAY (not report-quarter), and ref(x,0) returns the DATA-START first-day value (上市第一天; 2007-01-04 for pre-2007 stocks) — NOT today. So EpsTTMGr% = (ref(每股收益,0)−ref(每股收益,4))/abs(ref(每股收益,4))−1 evaluates to (每股收益@2007-01-04 − 每股收益@4-trading-days-ago)/|now| − 1: a ~19-yr EPS level-change plus an erroneous trailing −1, NOT a TTM-YoY. (果仁 own canonical growth caliber = (TTM(x,0)−TTM(x,4))/abs(TTM(x,4)), 财务指标公式 line 65; 每股收益 itself = TTM(归母净利润,0)/总股本, line 75.) CONFIRMED by inverting 果仁 EpsTTMGr%+每股收益 → implied ref(每股收益,0): 茅台1.44/万科0.42/格力0.73/恒瑞0.57/工行0.11 (all match 2006-era EPS; universe median 0.58≈2007 levels; ratio X0/X4 dispersed −98..+172 = ancient/current, not YoY≈1). The 每股收益 FIELD reproduces cleanly (Spearman 0.9975); the composite is irreproducible because its target is a mis-written-formula artifact, not an economic factor — nothing to chase. export col EpsTTMGr% in 果仁_20251231_排除ST排除科创_排名-ATRN50+EpsTTMGr.xlsx
